title: phyllanthus microphyllus
intro: Phyllanthus microphyllus, also known as the small-leaved phyllanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus microphyllus include its potential to reduce liver damage, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as decoctions and infusions, as well as in modern formulations like capsules and tablets.
